\tzpentry{ID4408}{Displacement Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4408 introduces Displacement Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \frac{\mathrm{D}^2 \xi^\mu}{\mathrm{d}\tau^2} + R^\mu{}_{\nu\rho\sigma}\,u^\nu \xi^\rho u^\sigma = 0. \end{equation}
